use_cases: Hero section atmospheric backgrounds for landing pages
Product showcase backgrounds with ethereal visual depth
Portfolio and creative website atmospheric effects
Immersive storytelling and brand presentation environments
ai_summary: A realistic fog background component that creates atmospheric depth and visual interest through layered translucent effects. Designed for hero sections and landing pages, it adds ethereal, dream-like quality with smooth gradient transitions and optional scroll or parallax animations. Suitable for creating immersive brand experiences across SaaS, media, and creative platforms.
